statusDetails.message:
- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx

[404] Not Found:

    `{"httpStatusCode":404,"httpStatusDescription":"Not Found","appErrorCode":"FDR-3001","errors":[{"message":"Flow with ID [2026-07-0188888888888-0001] not found."}]}`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X GET -H 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: [Filtered]' 'https://api.uat.platform.pagopa.it/fdr-org/service/v1/organizations/15376371009/fdrs/2026-07-0188888888888-0001/revisions/1/psps/88888888888/payments?page=1&size=50&subscription-key=%5BFiltered%5D'
